title: rubus clethraphilus var. latifolius
intro: Rubus clethraphilus var. latifolius, also known as the Japanese raspberry or broad-leaved bramble, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Rubus clethraphilus var. latifolius include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
